## Maturity and publication

- Repository is not public-ready until history/owner-decision blockers are resolved.
- Public package validation does not certify whole-repo publication readiness.
- This PR does not claim public-ready, Level 4, Level 5, or enterprise-ready.

## Non-goals

- [ ] Runtime changes

- [ ] Global/user Codex config changes
- [ ] CI, package files, lockfiles, or deployment config updates
